info.name: text-delete
info.text: Theories can be easily broken down.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Theories are only as stable as their contractors.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Theories are a meeting place for likeminded people.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Theories can collapse as quickly as they are built.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Theories have more layers than what meets the eye.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Theories must be built from the ground up.
